home.title: Catch | The event before the match
home.description: Catch turns curated singles events in Mumbai and Indore into real dating context. Choose a hosted event, show up, catch privately, and match with people you actually met.
home.twitterDescription: Curated singles events in Mumbai and Indore become real dating context.

host.title: Host singles events on Catch | 0% platform fee for founding hosts
host.description: Publish your event, balance the guest list, take payments, run the night from one screen, and get proof people connected. Catch gives clubs, venues, and independent hosts everything after the Instagram post.
host.twitterDescription: Event setup, admission, waitlists, live facilitation, check-in, and aggregate post-event reporting for hosts.

organizers.title: Organizer directory | Catch
organizers.description: Find singles-event organizers across India — clubs, venues, and independent hosts — with verified guest reviews and upcoming events.
organizers.twitterDescription: Search Catch organizer and club profiles.

claim.title: Claim your organizer page | Catch
claim.description: Find an unclaimed organizer profile, verify ownership, and request access to Catch host tools.
claim.twitterDescription: Claim an organizer profile and unlock Catch host tools.

privacy.title: Privacy policy | Catch
privacy.description: Learn how Torana, operating Catch, collects, uses, shares, protects, and responds to requests about personal data.
privacy.twitterDescription: How Catch handles personal data, privacy choices, and requests.

terms.title: Terms of use | Catch
terms.description: Read the rules for using Catch, organizer listings, event pages, accounts, host tools, and related services.
terms.twitterDescription: The rules for using Catch and its public organizer and event services.

help.title: Help and safety | Catch
help.description: Get Catch account, privacy, listing, event, safety, and website support, including correction, claim, and takedown help.
help.twitterDescription: Get account, listing, event, privacy, website, and safety help from Catch.

not_found.title: Page not found | Catch
not_found.description: This Catch page does not exist. Search organizer profiles, browse the member site, or explore host tools.
not_found.twitterDescription: Search organizer profiles, browse the member site, or explore Catch host tools.

event.catchTwitterTemplate: {title} by {organizer}. Booking stays in the Catch app.
event.externalTwitterTemplate: {title} from {source}. Registration stays on the official source.
